name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Joan=20Perry=20for=20Congress?=
subject: A message of hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joan Perry for Congress, All rights reserved
body:
Meet my friend Charis. | | | | [ ](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=aacb1e0655&e=0bf1d0f47f)
---
| | | It's finally summertime and the last thing we want to hear is more bickering from the folks in Washington, DC. So I'm here to change the messaging coming out of the Swamp and spread a message of hope, hope for the unborn.

**[Just yesterday, I was endorsed by former Vice Presidential nominee, Gov. Sarah Palin](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=af84836418&e=0bf1d0f47f). **She said, "As a lifelong Republican and pediatrician who’s helped babies the size of her hand, Dr. Joan Perry is the last thing Nancy Pelosi wants in Congress. That’s why I’m thrilled to endorse her and urge my fellow conservatives to vote for her on July 9th."

[Gov. Palin is right and that's why I want you to meet my friend Charis](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=d087f2476b&e=0bf1d0f47f). I've known Charis since the minute she was born and she is proof that every child deserves a chance to live. It's frightening to know that there are liberals in Congress who are opposed to the right to life, even for babies born alive. They don't want a conservative pediatrician fighting for life. **But I'm not intimidated, I will fight for every child!**

This Saturday we have three events around the district and we need your help. We're going to knock on doors and tell our neighbors that Congress needs a conservative pediatrician who is willing and able to speak for the sanctity of all life and a stronger America. **Help me stand up to the liberals and fight for the little people like Charis!** If you're willing to help, email our Grassroots Team, [Sheen Mayberry and Blake Belch](mailto:blake@drjoanperry.com, sheen@drjoanperry.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20help%20volunteer!).

**See you this Saturday!**

Joan Perry

P.S. Early Voting is underway! Don't forget to make a plan to vote and encourage your friends and family to do the same. Find your [polling location here](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=a6a7033af1&e=0bf1d0f47f).

name: K-12 team [Tim Ryan]
subject: our kids are going through a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Team,

Our children are at the center of increasing gun violence, racial division, stagnant wages, and an opioid epidemic.

In low-income communities, **kids often go to school hungry.** How can we expect our kids to focus in math class when all they can think about is how badly their stomach hurts?

**Not only that, but more than 1.3 million students are either homeless or their families are facing housing insecurity. **Think about the stress and trauma inflicted on these kids every single day.

These experiences are far too normal for many children in this country. That's why Tim's plan for education includes increasing investments in mental health and trauma counseling and other social-emotional initiatives.

There are too many forgotten communities across this country -- but it is unacceptable for kids to be among them.

[**That 's why we are asking you to chip in $3 or whatever you can to help Tim find the resources to put his bold plan for education reform into action.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9cfd/5486deaa/225ec66c/dc914fe/881867796/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-education?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190702_3_3_T2&amount=3&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+are+asking+you+to+chip&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190702_3_3_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190702_3_3_T2")

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name: stop Russia's election interference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
At a meeting last week with Vladimir Putin, a reporter asked President Trump whether he'll tell Russia to stop interfering in American elections. President Trump responded by jokingly looking at Putin and saying "Don't meddle in the election."
President Trump: election interference by Russia is no joke and it's time we take decisive action to protect the integrity of our democracy.
**[Add your name now to tell President Trump and Leader Mitch McConnell to start taking election security seriously.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c87/42ab3cf4/63a82a4c/135d6bb7/663612932/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-stop-russia-s-election-interference?source=em190702&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
The success of our democracy depends on the idea that every vote counts -- and that our elections will be safe from foreign interference.
With 2020 on the horizon, we can't afford to wait any longer to address the ways Russia interfered in the 2016 election and prevent Putin and others from interfering in our elections ever again.
**[Tell President Trump and Leader McConnell to stop siding with dictators and start taking action to stop election interference in 2020.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c87/42ab3cf4/63a82a4c/135d6bb7/663612932/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-stop-russia-s-election-interference?source=em190702&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c87/42ab3cf4/63a82a4c/135d6bb7/663612932/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-stop-russia-s-election-interference?source=em190702&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

Friend,

---
| As President Donald J. Trump's campaign manager for the 2020 Election, I cannot tell you enough how integral grassroots supporters, like YOU, have been in our success so far.

We're still over a year from Election Day and we're already SHATTERING expectations. We just raised a _**RECORD BREAKING $105 MILLION**_ last quarter - a massive fundraising achievement that no 2020 Democrat can even try to match.

Peter, Wow — we did it! We showed what people power can do! Thank you to everyone who donated, shared, spread the word, or did anything to help us get to this point. I wanted to tell you about some of what we were able to accomplish. We hit our $25,000 end of quarter goal — all thanks to small dollar grassroots donations from folks who want to see real representation in this district! Those donations came from around 90% of people donating under $100 — not a bunch of big donors who can call the shots. We have had over 2,000 individual donations this year — raising over $250,000!
I want to thank our staff, our volunteers, and every single donor who chipped in to our campaign because they know that we can finally flip this district. We didn’t rely on corporate PACs or big money interests to fund this campaign. We relied on people who simply want to see someone who will stand up for our shared progressive values in Congress. Last year we did an amazing thing — we turned a solid red seat into a national battleground. This year we can finish the job and your help is making that happen. Thank you! For the people,

| |
---
| Dear Friend,
On Monday, I had the honor of speaking at the New York State Republican Convention.
I used it as an opportunity to expose the truth about what has taken place in Albany under one party rule over the first 6 months of this year. Many of the steps our legislature and our governor have taken are very disturbing; in fact, they are radical and wrong!
---
| | | [WATCH NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BucUoE23FS6d9NLGMNW-vPQZa3J5xOtP8rdYb2eLio3FwsLe6CRkMQNQnXhFog76CqvlbZPBZ4_CxUTFnWXFS-kuy-htCft_-_cLZ2k11GREFUzfVdgGd0J_aJrEesWRC6pdAMyPoBB1rrLnNG2S2jSRZVOwSqTGs5A5y3cIoZGjJhFbSHD8tQ==&c=Lc4qpBvhA4fRrEBiTa6nijDRD0BVOSU3ZXwHfs1ANYlEr9xA_er4lg==&ch=EaLuCbz3uO32ikA_8lUXnLPoc3kIkXiCUi0msTbrre7wmxIp6FdfLA==)
---
| Sadly, the same thing has happened with the New York City Congressional Delegation and that's one of the reasons I'm running for Congress. Because frankly, the far left Democrats that represent our city seem incapable of putting aside partisan politics and working with President Trump and his administration for the betterment of our city.
It's disgraceful that Rep. Ocasio-Cortez labeled federal migrant facilities "concentration camps" and that Rep. Omar, who has repeatedly spewed anti-Semitic and anti-American comments remains on the House Foreign Affairs Committee. My opponent has not only remained silent, but he has joined them in voting against even simple measures like condemning voting by illegal immigrants in municipal elections.
As we celebrate our nation's birth and the freedoms we cherish this 4th of July, it's evident now, more than ever, that the 2020 elections will be about preserving our American values for future generations. Won't you fight alongside me for this noble cause?
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nicole Malliotakis
---

I wanted to make sure you had a chance to read my latest OpEd in the Wall Street Journal [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=70668cf2f9324e57ab554fc4139e51ea&_e=tR0KFy6uUajnqHyXn0_jJDitUd7Z0QPkJIYMmQcZJ9FQggBdL7_palIkHl3kNGIxKoA-18M30Ek_Ys1hc6ssEG0k4NVBfT3mLadjyXRnOFsMgOm4t4DAYn2tqxHbfaxuyfQxjpX31xunfg019WGATWfKm8p5UbNWZ_c9nwymxNvJHnTHteLHxyeCt9KkJ0pJzTeH_olIvIVOgOoxHgVHNvhop_L3DMMq7H4R-nAIVeNqV51voxeq03d7J4JkmbiNqeq2rB3ZtETMAelEj-QtLQ%3D%3D) Hello Everyone,
I wanted to make sure you had a chance to read my latest OpEd in the Wall Street Journal, titled “The GOP’S Duty: Explain the Cost of ‘Free’.” I hope it can help clarify that not everything in this country can become free without long term effects. [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=70668cf2f9324e57ab554fc4139e51ea&_e=tR0KFy6uUajnqHyXn0_jJNhk5tMrovbz1_QCxOatV9ovpehAksLRmfzaAFdbQDgmuxjLmSZ7FXkCtE-MUJefABoiwO-EuzVUPD7wScCCfgr7LVtm6n1qaiCHBEaeEttqNPG3WAxVPT8okAFdRvWWJoUz5UlP9A-3KUiqen3kQRl-8HCMcBHSUtoYZuFw3UTSiBXAhBmGb-ikuBy3nsDNvk5IhwHpSPqOWgS2Rg78Vv48b0HpygvSQfO_xmDeuy8OslWccQiks_BMLxMXeC6YoIF4aBBpuSuoVyASpABy0Tuo0J_1WHWh0t-ABrqv87-eEtppDDD4BbgCrw_Cqt2uG6tvInCdOlBPuWuyS4AWFZKd0051xXKwgBLqwPNb6Ryf) [ Read the full article here ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=70668cf2f9324e57ab554fc4139e51ea&_e=tR0KFy6uUajnqHyXn0_jJNhk5tMrovbz1_QCxOatV9ovpehAksLRmfzaAFdbQDgmuxjLmSZ7FXkCtE-MUJefABoiwO-EuzVUPD7wScCCfgr7LVtm6n1qaiCHBEaeEttqNPG3WAxVPT8okAFdRvWWJoUz5UlP9A-3KUiqen3kQRnQfWN9F9h66ejZxyigOkCC0-zrcT5so0rkq6JsA0OSMsY0XVKWH27TxesnJT23WfEqwNuD2wSm94g4V45SyiqRgWzHv5LpbE4RJEpDNcVAw_wRiH_l0Zl2x7eYx_FaVzrHxHz-eYIL3WcRCx1D9em7ErlN4fOyYNdjopxiDGbJdAUxrtGHEz_Mu-kMx3Pi7i6UpunbNtgIymE3jWRX9zT-) “Free” means less efficiency, more expense, and lower quality. While progressives highlight the unpopular aspects of private insurance, they won’t tell voters the private sector is more likely to promote innovation without concern for lobbyist-armed special interests and rent-seekers. Think of how long it took for the federal government, via Medicare, to pay for prescription drugs, ambulatory surgery, and other outpatient services. It already takes tens of thousands of pages of regulations to administer Medicare, whereby the government sets thousands of prices in thousands of counties for millions of beneficiaries.

If you want to learn more, click below and read the full article. [ Read the full article here ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=70668cf2f9324e57ab554fc4139e51ea&_e=tR0KFy6uUajnqHyXn0_jJNhk5tMrovbz1_QCxOatV9ovpehAksLRmfzaAFdbQDgmuxjLmSZ7FXkCtE-MUJefABoiwO-EuzVUPD7wScCCfgr7LVtm6n1qaiCHBEaeEttqNPG3WAxVPT8okAFdRvWWJoUz5UlP9A-3KUiqen3kQRmsECcVd2pOHkQmyj1lsH9O0Ad_vqXkUzXrYsTifcCXJx1qYSqnmvpgYXgx4cZByXdOtzeQdDmU0i_Nf2ZjGkQpdIldOA3aCITxZL9GavbaJQtgdqL3sr-xTMeZ-ABlWkxH13v-1Xc90X83sWjvF514gB42sNwOkJJecgc2OKh2tesrz-sZgR8z7S1HPuJ-C6JkjZaXJejbSz5MpKZlUASt) Sincerely,

| | Great news: Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal before Sunday's FEC deadline. (All without a cent from corporate PACs, too!)

Thanks for all your help in getting us there. I'm grateful to have you on my team.

I also wanted to let you know about "Conole on Your Corner" -- a monthly series of breakfast roundtables, tavern meet-and-greets, local business tours, backyard BBQs, and town hall meetings throughout our district to talk with voters.

I hope you'll join us for one of these events. [**Click here to find a "Conole on Your Corner" event happening near you!**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b06d/388db0e9/86ef537/609a8f68/1698971925/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/events/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+find+a+ldquoConole+on+Your&utm_campaign=FC_EM_EN_90DO_190703_1_1&source=FC_EM_EN_90DO_190703_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_EN_90DO_190703_1_1")

Finally, I want to wish you a happy and safe Fourth of July. I hope you enjoy the parades and celebrations and keep the sacrifices of our service members -- who have provided us with the freedoms we enjoy today -- in your thoughts.

Thank you again,

Francis |

subject: Tijuana Authorities Investigating Migrant Groups Trying to Buy Children to Cross into the United States
body:
"Some migrants in Tijuana are trying to purchase children from vulnerable single mothers in local shelters so they can more easily..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=471068a1bf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Tijuana Authorities Investigating Migrant Groups Trying to Buy Children to Cross into the United States**

“Some migrants in Tijuana are trying to purchase children from vulnerable single mothers in local shelters so they can more easily cross into the United States, according to shelter directors, migrants and Tijuana law enforcement authorities,” Wendy Fry reports for _The San Diego Union-Tribune_.

“U.S. border authorities have been warning since June 2018 about people fraudulently using children who aren’t theirs to pose as family units and gain entry into the United States a claim that critics said was overblown. But now, authorities in Tijuana are warning migrant mothers to keep their children close by and supervised, after reports of men offering to purchase migrant children in order to cross.”

“I can’t go to work because I can’t take my eyes off my boys,” a migrant from Honduras says. “They want to rob our kids so they can cross into the United States.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=277a8c98dd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Don’t look now, but quietly or at least in a way that hasn’t really been absorbed by much of America, there is positive movement on health care reform. Before anyone knows it, we might just find that the ground has been set for meaningful reform,” [_The Dallas Morning News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23bf8f831a&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. Most recently, President Donald J. Trump signed an executive order last week that pushes for greater transparency in healthcare pricing. “The president is on the right track. We have a right to know what we’ll be charged and keeping it all a secret until we’re on the hook invites waste and inefficiency.”
---
|
---
| Former President Obama's Secretary of Homeland Security criticized Democrats who came out in support of decriminalizing illegal border crossings, Julio Rosas reports in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17db343d34&e=3ee4985eea). “That is tantamount to declaring publicly that we have open borders,” Jeh Johnson told _The Washington Post_. “That is unworkable, unwise and does not have the support of a majority of American people or the Congress, and if we had such a policy, instead of 100,000 apprehensions a month, it will be multiples of that.”
---
|
---
| “For the first time in a U.S. trade agreement, the USMCA would include rules to address all biotechnologies, including new technologies such as gene-editing, to support 21st century innovations in agriculture,” Rep. Lloyd Smucker (R-PA) writes in [Lancaster Online](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=448daa7841&e=3ee4985eea). “These important and forward-thinking changes will prepare our farmers of today with the tools for tomorrow.”
---
|

name: Megan West
subject: A Reminder to Us All this Independence Day
body:
| | Happy Independence Day!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvOVJe_6YTSlzNjlv8o2mykhig2ETg-IEcWzTTt9kXi8PIXMZ9CWVmo2gZbznA9qb2MKdfWcfLW4Cc4A-0pDPHdj&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190703com01&n=1)
| Peter, It’s one of my favorite times of the year. Parades, picnics, fireworks and all things red, white and blue to mark America’s birthday. Growing up in a farming community in the Midwest, summertime meant plenty of hometown parades to celebrate our American pride and values. As a child, I loved all the sights and sounds. As I got older, I was honored to be a member of our high school marching band, turning my observation of the procession of people, floats, fire trucks, and flinging candy to full participation in the all-American tradition. While I still love a good parade, something has been bothering me as the years go on. In fact, it’s really disheartening. I would challenge all of us this Independence Day to consider this issue. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvOVJe_6YTSlzNjlv8o2mykhig2ETg-IEcWzTTt9kXi8PIXMZ9CWVmo2gZbznA9qb2MKdfWcfLW4Cc4A-0pDPHdj&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190703com01&n=2) You can read my full article, _[A Reminder to Us All this Independence Day](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvOVJe_6YTSlzNjlv8o2mykhig2ETg-IEcWzTTt9kXi8PIXMZ9CWVmo2gZbznA9qb2MKdfWcfLW4Cc4A-0pDPHdj&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190703com01&n=3)_ , to learn the one thing I believe we need to ensure our families and communities don’t fail to do for our nation’s birthday. **United. We Stand.** Megan West
Media Host and Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190703com01&n=4)

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: What it means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8002903/76559435/979390018?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjBmZjIwNC1lMDlkLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chtifVAJsZ4zBIO7mnhSjC5DL5k45glrcbaEdwGs2TE=)

Hey Peter,
Happy Fourth!
Growing up near an Army base, Independence Day always held a special significance to me. Seeing the glow of fireworks light up the sky reminded me of the generations of Americans, going back to the very first Independence Day, who answered the call to serve our nation. **Our brave men and women in uniform are the reason our American values and freedoms persist and thrive to this day. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8002904/76559436/-1594214468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjBmZjIwNC1lMDlkLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chtifVAJsZ4zBIO7mnhSjC5DL5k45glrcbaEdwGs2TE=&refcode=email20190704)
Tomorrow, we will also honor the leaders who worked tirelessly to extend freedom and equality to all Americans. From the civil rights movement, to labor advocates continuing the legacy of César Chávez and Dolores Huerta, to the brave Americans who birthed the LGBTQ+ rights movement at the Stonewall Inn - **nothing is more American than fighting back in the face of injustice.** It is our patriotic duty to continue the work they started.
I wish you and your family a day of celebration filled with fireworks, parades, and, of course, barbecue.
Happy Independence Day,
Elisa Cardnell

subject: Steve Daines' hypocrisy will make your blood boil

body:
#
Team,
When it comes to our veterans, Steve Daines' hypocrisy is enough to make your blood boil.
Yesterday, Wilmot's opponent attended the groundbreaking of the Southwest Montana Veterans Home in Butte. He posted pictures on social media claiming he'd always fight for our veterans.
That's what he says, but his actions paint a different picture. In the Senate, he callously voted against funding for that very same veterans home.
**[Our veterans deserve our unwavering support. Want to help replace Steve Daines with a U.S. Senator who will truly stand with our nation's heroes? Contribute $5 now.](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190703&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Wilmot served in the Army National Guard, the Army Reserves, and the Navy Reserves for more than twenty years. He understands firsthand the sacrifices our soldiers make in service to this country, and he will fight for the support they need every day as Montana's next Senator.
Senator Jon Tester worked for years to make the Southwest Montana Veterans Home a reality for our nation's heroes in Butte. Steve Daines didn't do anything to help, and now he wants to take the credit? Sorry, Steve, but Montanans aren't fooled by your blatant hypocrisy. With this move Daines joins Senator Tester's 2018 Senate opponent, Matt Rosendale, in his lip service to veterans. Veterans need our support, our hard work, not just empty promises. We need two United States Senators voting for Montana, not just showing up at ribbon cuttings.
[**Montana 's veterans need two Senators standing with them in Washington, D.C. It's time to retire Steve Daines and send Wilmot to the Senate. Will you chip in $5 now?**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190703&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Team Wilmot

With this move Daines joins Senator Tester's 2018 Senate opponent, Matt Rosendale, in his lip service to veterans. Veterans need our support, our hard work, not just empty promises. We need two United States Senators voting for Montana, not just showing up at ribbon cuttings. "=" Thank you, Team Wilmot "=" * Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624

Tim has always been a trailblazer -- and his plan for education is nothing short of bold. He wants to ensure that every school is on the path to becoming a public community school, with well-supported teachers and families, access to nutritious school meals and college and career pathways.

name: Marcy Kaptur for Congress
subject: Reflecting on Independence Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
| | | Friends, In these troubling times, we need patriots more than ever. We need Americans who understand the promise of this nation, and work to renew it every day. It can be easy to lose faith in the commitment of some in Washington, D.C. to secure the blessings of liberty for future generations. For too many Americans, we've fallen short of the ideals our Founders set aside. My faith comes from the American people, ordinary men and women who want to live and work and provide for their children. My faith comes from those who have struggled for worker's rights, those who built the strongest middle class this earth has seen. My faith comes from civil rights activists who demanded, and demand today, that our government live up to the simple truth that we are all created equal. My faith is renewed by men and women around the country who won't stand for human rights abuses in detention centers being operated in our name. My faith is grounded and strengthened by the sacrifice of millions who have taken up arms in the defense of liberty around the world. In short, my faith in the persistence of liberty and the idea of this great nation lies with you. [Together, we will continue to fight for the America](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BgE/ni0YAA/t.2sz/K91CO7dZST2dyyuMn0na-Q/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKtW2rCKMvObXtni6VNfSXuN-2FrkaY8gCSyWDOMMFOfRcbb4LD2WBA7oZdFxDJNGBVyJ-2FvAMXhJzfiR-2FUDWV4QZbmBaMEQ6ze3ycTY6QcY7RJceGhy-2Fsw-2BXBx6vPTdMzV4HohgDGcF2xGMnvO19Oygg02JvxZknkBIGLGa8yT8RzFqJIpHbA29OJZjNiA7e61q0D5OWeNnr3b7M9-2FAlQCxHhoNXsOzg8fjhJd0PBflNjvOt-2Fun3QGfnaOA2MZdg-2FH-2Bw-3D/DPcn) we know and love. Happy Independence Day, and blessings to you and your family, Marcy

subject: Watch the greatest Fourth of July celebration in our Nation’s history tomorrow
body:
Tomorrow, Americans will gather in Washington, D.C., for a celebration of our Nation’s independence on its 243rd birthday. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c8baeb7a1d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 3, 2019
---
| | |
# **Watch the greatest Fourth of July celebration in our Nation’s history tomorrow**

**Tomorrow,** Americans will gather in Washington, D.C., for a celebration of our Nation’s independence on its 243rd birthday.

**Year after year** , the Fourth of July is a patriotic reminder of the freedoms and opportunities this country has blessed us with. This year, President Donald J. Trump is inviting Americans to join him for a first-of-its-kind ceremony on the National Mall.

**🎬** **Watch** : [President Trump’s “Salute to America” live tomorrow at 6:30 p.m. ET](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf8c2027a5&e=3ee4985eea)

**The****“****Salute to America****”****** will be kicked off by President Trump at the Lincoln Memorial tomorrow at 6:30 p.m. ET, followed by a celebration that will honor each of America’s five military branches with music, military demonstrations, and multiple flyovers.

**“This is going** to be a fantastic Fourth of July with increased access across the National Mall . . . and an address by our Commander-in-Chief,” Interior Secretary David Bernhardt said. “We received an extraordinary donation for a phenomenal fireworks display, and our colleagues from the Department of Defense will be providing a one-of-a-kind music and air power experience including a flight demonstration from the Blue Angels.”

**Of course,** there’s no better way to cap off Independence Day than with a spectacular fireworks show. Tomorrow night, the National Park Service and its partners will host one for the ages. With D.C.’s iconic monuments and memorials as the backdrop, the 35-minute show will be the largest fireworks display ever in the Washington capital region.

**“Our July 4th** Salute to America at the Lincoln Memorial is looking to be really big,” President Trump wrote on Twitter today. “It will be the show of a lifetime!”

[Plan your visit: More on tomorrow’s “Salute to America.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3599c1a3b3&e=3ee4985eea)

**_Washington Examiner_****:** [Boom: Donations to Trump’s July Fourth ‘Salute’ to Double Fireworks Display, Longest Ever](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05b78ac0fa&e=3ee4985eea)

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Our July issues survey
body:
Wow, just wow.

We’ve had some really special moments lately, haven’t we? The energy we’ve
felt since last Thursday’s presidential debate has been electric. Then, on
Sunday, we closed out our second quarterly fundraising push of the
campaign -- positioning us to be stronger than before right out of the
gate for the next quarter.

Doug and I even had a chance to march in the San Francisco Pride parade
last weekend and, as you can tell, we had a lot of fun:

I’m reaching out today to say thank you. With your support, we reached our
second quarterly fundraising target of our campaign. Each time I’ve called
on you to step up, you’ve answered the call.

You’ve donated, volunteered your time, organized in your communities, and
done so much more to keep our grassroots team strong. You’ve been
alongside me each step of the way.

Our campaign wouldn’t be possible without you -- that’s a fact.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190703-july-survey?refcode=ema190703-full&source=ema190703-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1001&akid=5523%2E5755789%2EkFtHV8 ]Now, I’m reaching out to hear from YOU. We’re just a few weeks out from
the next presidential debates that take place at the end of July. If
you’re able, can you spend a few moments and share your thoughts on our
July issues survey?

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190703-july-survey?refcode=ema190703-full&source=ema190703-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1002&akid=5523%2E5755789%2EkFtHV8 ]Take the survey

We have a lot of work ahead of us in the months to come. The task before
us is to spread our vision of what America can truly be, built on our
values of justice, decency, truth, freedom, and equality -- an America for
all of us.

I’m heading back on the road again to meet with voters in critical states
and listen as we continue to build our winning campaign -- and hearing
directly from you about the issues that matter most will better inform our
strategy as we head into July.

Thanks for all you do for our campaign, our country, and our future.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

Kamala Harris is running a campaign made of the people, for the people,
and by the people. Not a single dime comes from corporate PACs or federal
lobbyists -- just grassroots people like you.

It’s on us to seize our momentum and introduce Kamala to millions more
undecided voters across the country. Power our campaign by adding
a donation below:

You’ve donated, volunteered your time, organized in your communities, and done so much more to keep our grassroots team strong. You’ve been alongside me each step of the way. Our campaign wouldn’t be possible without you -- that’s a fact. [ ]Now, I’m reaching out to hear from YOU. We’re just a few weeks out from the next presidential debates that take place at the end of July. If you’re able, can you spend a few moments and share your thoughts on our July issues survey? [ ]Take the survey We have a lot of work ahead of us in the months to come. The task before us is to spread our vision of what America can truly be, built on our values of justice, decency, truth, freedom, and equality -- an America for all of us. I’m heading back on the road again to meet with voters in critical states and listen as we continue to build our winning campaign -- and hearing directly from you about the issues that matter most will better inform our strategy as we head into July. Thanks for all you do for our campaign, our country, and our future. For The People, — Kamala Harris Kamala Harris is running a campaign made of the people, for the people, and by the people. Not a single dime comes from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists -- just grassroots people like you. It’s on us to seize our momentum and introduce Kamala to millions more undecided voters across the country. name: Team Beto
subject: Juárez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
The Trump administration has created a humanitarian crisis at our border. Children are sleeping on cold, concrete floors, in ice-cold rooms in facilities in our own country – and living on the streets in border towns like Juárez, Mexico. The inhumanity is intentional, and it’s being done in our own name.
Beto went to Juárez to hear the stories of asylum seekers who have been turned away from our country and then held a rally at the Clint Border Patrol station.
**The visits to Clint and Juárez were a powerful reminder of why we’re in this work together –[see for yourself:](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18063?t=1&akid=40346%2E444211%2Ex95Feo)**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18063?t=2&akid=40346%2E444211%2Ex95Feo)
**[Watch and share »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18063?t=3&akid=40346%2E444211%2Ex95Feo)**
**Please share the video with your networks too** – so that more people can learn what’s happening and how to support local, on-the-ground legal services to children and families. Diocesan Migrant & Refugee Services of El Paso is the organization we’re supporting. You can chip in [here](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18064?refcode=ema20190703-40346&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40346%2E444211%2Ex95Feo) (100% of your contribution will go directly to their work).
Together, we can pull this country out of deep division and create a new vision for America – one where we are not defined by fear and paranoia, where we welcome immigrants, and where we embrace the simple notion that everyone deserves to live with dignity.
Thank you for speaking out and standing up against injustice – today and every day.
– Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=40346%2E444211%2Ex95Feo). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

### [Did the Democrats Just Re-Elect President Trump at Their Debates Last Week?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-j/)
It is my humble opinion, that the Democrats, in their very first debate last week, went a considerable way towards re-electing President Trump in the upcoming 2020 election. I'm on the blog talking about it today.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Here Come the Democrat Debates - Aaaaah!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-d/)
Tonight and tomorrow night 20 Democrats are going to be debating each other. Each thinks he or she ought to be the next president of the United States. I'm on the blog talking about what we can expect.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Hidin' Joe Biden](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-u/)
Joe Biden is clearly the frontrunner at this time to win the Democratic nomination for president. He's way ahead in virtually all the polls. But where exactly IS Joe Biden?

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Faux Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jihilhtt-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrats in Congress have a big problem. Their base, the people who are hardcore Democrats, and vote Democrat every election come hell or highwater, hate Donald Trump, and want him impeached. Most of the rest of America, meaning virtually all Republicans, and the majority of independents, are sick of talking about it, and think it's a big waste of time and money. So what are Democrats to do?

Click the link below to read this week's blog about it.
